mapper.update: UPDATE fin_receivable SET paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fin_receivable WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT * FROM fin_receivable
is_deleted = false
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount - paid_amount), 0) FROM fin_receivable WHERE is_deleted = false AND status != 'paid'
mapper.update: UPDATE fin_receivable SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
